message:
feat(fr-command): wire DEBUG CHANGE-REPL-ID + STRINGMATCH-LEN/TEST + QUICKLIST-PACKED-THRESHOLD (br-frankenredis-s11v)

Redis 7+ test infra relies on these DEBUG subcommands. Previously they fell through to the
'unknown subcommand' error and broke conformance harnesses that drive them.

- CHANGE-REPL-ID: accept-and-OK (replication state machine doesn't yet model dual repl-ids;
  matches upstream wire contract for tests that don't inspect new ids)
- STRINGMATCH-LEN: accept-and-OK no-op breakpoint hook
- STRINGMATCH-TEST: returns upstream's literal 'Apparently Redis did not crash: test passed'
- QUICKLIST-PACKED-THRESHOLD: parses memory-value argument (k/m/g suffixes), validates the
  upstream range (1 < n < 4GB), emits upstream's exact error wording on bad input

4 new tests pin the upstream wording.

fr-command 656 passed; cargo clippy --tests -D warnings clean; cargo fmt --check clean.

Closes br-frankenredis-s11v.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
